An iron [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]] in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]], '''Arrissa's Field''' was named after the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Arrissa n'Osnyi]]. Pirates often used the field to launch strikes on passing [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], hidden within the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] field and covered by the nearby [[Obligon Nebula]]. Following the rise of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces patrolled the area in an attempt to keep pirates away for good.

==Appearances==
